query_spec.natural_query: VP Sales or Head of Sales at US cybersecurity SaaS startups in the United States

variants.query: VP Sales or Head of Sales at US cybersecurity SaaS startups in the United States
variants.rationale: Baseline: the natural query without any broadening.

variants.query: ("VP Sales" OR "Vice President of Sales" OR "Sales VP") "cybersecurity SaaS" "United States"
variants.rationale: This variant broadens the title to include full form and alternative title structures for VP Sales.

variants.query: ("Head of Sales" OR "Sales Director" OR "Sales Leader") "cybersecurity SaaS" "United States"
variants.rationale: This variant broadens the title to include functional synonyms for Head of Sales.

variants.query: ("Chief Sales Officer" OR "CSO" OR "Sales Executive") "cybersecurity SaaS" "United States"
variants.rationale: This variant broadens the title to include C-suite forms and executive-level titles.
This variant broadens the industry to include the general term 'cybersecurity' without specifying SaaS.

variants.query: ("VP Sales" OR "Head of Sales") "SaaS security" "United States"
variants.rationale: This variant broadens the industry to include 'SaaS security' as a related field.

variants.query: ("VP Sales" OR "Head of Sales") "information security SaaS" "United States"
variants.rationale: This variant broadens the industry to include 'information security SaaS' as a related sector.

variants.query: ("VP Sales" OR "Head of Sales") "cybersecurity SaaS" ("USA" OR "US")
variants.rationale: This variant broadens the geography to include abbreviations for the United States.

variants.query: ("VP Sales" OR "Head of Sales") "cybersecurity SaaS" "North America"
variants.rationale: This variant broadens the geography to include the regional term 'North America'.

variants.query: ("VP Sales" OR "Head of Sales") "cybersecurity SaaS" ("California" OR "New York" OR "Texas")
variants.rationale: This variant broadens the geography to include state-level alternatives like California, New York, and Texas.
This variant combines title and geography broadening by using alternative titles and regional terms.
This variant combines title and industry broadening by using C-suite titles and related industry terms.

variants.query: ("Sales Executive" OR "Sales Leader") "information security SaaS" ("US" OR "California")
variants.rationale: This variant combines title, industry, and geography broadening by using executive titles, related industry terms, and state-level alternatives.
